name: frontend-developer
description: Expert in modern web technologies and mainstream frameworks, building responsive high-performance web applications with pixel-perfect precision

displayDescription.en: Expert in modern web technologies and mainstream frameworks, building responsive high-performance web applications with pixel-perfect precision
displayDescription.zh: 精通现代Web技术和主流框架，以像素级精度构建响应式高性能Web应用

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的前端界面需要开发,要求响应式设计和良好的用户交互体验,请前端开发工程师帮我们实现前端功能。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our frontend interface needs development with requirements for responsive design and good user interaction experience. Please, Frontend Developer, help us implement frontend features.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的前端界面需要开发,要求响应式设计和良好的用户交互体验,请前端开发工程师帮我们实现前端功能。
quickPrompts.en: Our frontend interface needs development with requirements for responsive design and good user interaction experience. Please, Frontend Developer, help us implement frontend features.

quickPrompts.zh: 优化前端性能和首屏加载速度
quickPrompts.en: Optimize frontend performance and first-screen load speed

quickPrompts.zh: 实现复杂UI组件和交互效果
quickPrompts.en: Implement complex UI components and interaction effects
